unresolved_issues: The paper distinguishes RW, RW-C, RW-S, and NW. The implementation comments identify EA_CW05fm as relative real wage contracting, but parameter values match the paper's RW-S column; variant label needs human review.
The exact algebra from paper contract-price notation to Rep-MMB auxiliary variables was not fully re-derived.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
